description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a combination of hip and flat roof sections, featuring a prominent attached garage at the front. The facade includes a covered entryway with steps leading up to the main door, flanked by a driveway and a walkway of rectangular pavers. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, with contrasting darker roofing and some wooden accent panels. Windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, with several large rectangular panes on both floors and additional windows on the side and rear elevations. The backyard area is enclosed by fencing and includes a patio or deck space, visible outdoor furniture, and landscaping elements. The overall design is modern with traditional influences, suitable for a residential neighborhood.
description: A modern two-story suburban house with a hip and flat roof, attached garage, covered entryway, and fenced backyard with patio. The exterior features light walls, dark roofing, and symmetrical window arrangements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, attached garage, driveway, walkway, and covered porch.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the hip roof, side windows, and the transition to the backyard and patio area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fenced backyard, flat-roofed sections, and rear windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the hip roof, side entry, and additional backyard features.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with steps, rectangular columns, and a prominent front door adjacent to the garage
